## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **TiaCommander version:** (e.g. v2.25.5)
- **TIA Portal version:** (e.g. V19, V20)
- **Windows version:** (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- **MCP client:** (e.g. Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code)
- **PLC model:** (e.g. S7-1200, S7-1500)

## Logs / Screenshots

Attach any relevant logs from `%APPDATA%/TiaCommander/Logs/` or screenshots.
